name: agentic-security
description: Defensive AppSec for Claude Code: SAST, SCA, and Secret scanning with auto-remediation. Built on a proven analyzer with 50+ vulnerability sinks, 60+ secret patterns, OSV-backed CVE lookup, and STRIDE/CWE mapping.
longDescription:
Agentic Security gives any Claude Code session first-class application-security analysis. Run `/security-scan` for a full SAST + SCA + Secret sweep, or let the included PostToolUse hook surface new high/critical findings the moment Claude edits a file. A `security-fixer` subagent turns findings into remediation patches.

Features:
- SAST with AST-based taint tracking (JS/TS) and regex fallback for Python/PHP/Ruby/Java/Go/Laravel
- SCA across 20 manifest formats with OSV.dev CVE lookup and vulnerable-call-depth filtering
- 60+ provider secret patterns, entropy detection, and TODO-near-security flagging
- STRIDE coverage view, SARIF/JSON/Markdown output, baseline + diff
